name: code-simplifier
description: Refine recently changed code for clarity, consistency, and maintainability while preserving behavior.

interface.shortDescription: Refine recent code changes without changing behavior.
interface.longDescription: Code Simplifier gives Codex a focused workflow for simplifying recently modified code while preserving exact behavior, following project instructions, and verifying the affected surface.
defaultPrompt: Use code-simplifier on my recent changes.
Simplify the code I just edited without changing behavior.
